speaker: speaker1
text: Hey Suzie . Guess what ? I'm having a baby !

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . I'm so excited . We've been trying for 8 months now .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's really exciting . How many months are you pregnant ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Are you going to find out if it is a boy or a girl ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to , but Bob doesn't . He wants to be surprised like the old fashioned way .

speaker: speaker2
text: Maybe it's more exciting not knowing .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'd rather know and buy all the baby things ahead of time .

speaker: speaker2
text: There are so many things you have to prepare for .

speaker: speaker1
text: I know I am going to be busy , but I know I can handle it . I have been looking forward to this day for a long long time .

speaker: speaker2
text: It really must be an exciting time for you guys .
